question: Recall the experiment of tossing two coins (Section 4.1) and let $x$ be the number of heads observed. Find the probability associated with each value of the random variable $x$, assuming the two coins are fair. Display these values in a table or graph.

meta_info.caption: Finding a Probability Distribution- Coin-Tossing Experiment
meta_info.section: 4.2 Probability Distributions for Discrete Random Variables
